---
title: "City of Edmonton Bats"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

## Methods

```{r}
#| include: true
#| echo: false
#| eval: true
#| warning: false
#| message: false

library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)


neigh <- read_sf("./coe-nbh/coe-nbh.shp")
neigh <- st_transform(neigh, crs = 4326)

pal <- colorFactor(palette = "Set3", domain = neigh$civic_ward)

leaflet(neigh) |>
  addTiles() |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor  = ~pal(civic_ward),
    fillOpacity = 0.7,
    color      = "white",
    weight     = 1.5,
    opacity    = 1,
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(
      weight      = 3,
      color       = "#e63946",
      fillOpacity = 0.9,
      bringToFront = TRUE
    ),
    label = ~name
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    pal    = pal,
    values = ~civic_ward,
    position = "bottomright"
  )

```
